name: ds-loosen-test
description: Adversarial fixture (extra, beyond the 8): AI-authored mutate candidate that loosens mutability from adaptive to generative. Template and api are held byte-identical to the base registration so Stage 1's hash check passes and the loosening is caught by the mutability module in Stage 3, not masked by structural/API drift.

constraints.rationale: mutability class must match declared value

provenance.author: ai
provenance.justification: Proposing a looser mutability class to enable faster iteration; rejected alternative was keeping it adaptive and filing a human request instead.
